title: [Q] DISCUSSION : end of data Reached Coruppted zip not found
author: AravinthK820
body:
I have been having a issue some times that my excel has getting converterd through unit8array from their i am getting end of data reached (data length = 0 , asked index = 4) coruppted Zip ? 

I have been uploading an excel from an frontend  , the frontend will process an excel and upload to s3 through converting into file of arraybuffer

and then i will process the excel in backend through getting an excel and send to read buffer i am getting this error why ??
